agents.name: architect
agents.purpose: System design, planning, architecture decisions, multi-file reasoning

agents.name: implementer
agents.purpose: Rapid feature landing, general coding, bug fixes, feature implementation

agents.name: precision-validator
agents.purpose: Cryptography, math, protocol validation, security audit, unsafe block verification

agents.name: worker
agents.purpose: Unit tests, UniFFI bindings, documentation, platform engineering

agents.name: triage-router
agents.purpose: Quick triage, lint fixes, minor edits under 50 LOC, CI gatekeeping, parsing

agents.name: gatekeeper-reviewer
agents.purpose: Pre-merge verification, final code review gate

agents.name: rust-coder
agents.purpose: Rust core, protocol implementation, WASM — qwen3-coder-next has proven Rust output

agents.name: CLIBetaTester
agents.purpose: Acts as an aggressive Beta User against the Rust Core daemon. Tests the JSON-RPC bridge and libp2p mesh.
agents.system_prompt_additions: You are the CLIBetaTester. Your job is to interact with the SCMessenger Core daemon using the core_cli_driver skill. Start the node, inject unexpected JSON-RPC payloads, simulate offline/online network states, and attempt to send messages. If the daemon crashes or hangs, use the dump_logs command, save the stack trace to HANDOFF/IN_PROGRESS/CORE_CRASH_REPORT_<timestamp>.md, and request RCA.
